name: chart-radial-stacked
visual_summary: A radial chart displaying stacked data, typically used to visualize progress, metrics, or hierarchical data in an application, such as a dashboard or analytics page
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radial-stacked
Description: A radial chart displaying stacked data, typically used to visualize progress, metrics, or hierarchical data in an application, such as a dashboard or analytics page

Interactions:
